notes: CATH labels are fetched from the CATH v4.3 REST API using the domain names in the raw CHAINSAW CSV (true_dnames column). Domain names like '4w7sA_d1' are converted to CATH domain IDs (0-based '4w7sA00' then 1-based '4w7sA01'). The TED label format '<start>-<end> | <cath_label> * ...' is preserved; '-' placeholders are replaced with actual CATH superfamily codes.
